message:
fix: normalize timestamp format to Z suffix for consistent data hashes

Replace to_rfc3339() with to_rfc3339_opts(SecondsFormat::Secs, true) in
data-affecting code paths. to_rfc3339() produces "+00:00" suffix while
the JSONL input data uses "Z" suffix — this inconsistency causes
identical data to produce different hashes, breaking cache invalidation.

Fixed locations:
- robot.rs: compute_data_hash() — CRITICAL, affects cache invalidation
- export_sqlite.rs: issue timestamps, dependency created_at, comment created_at
- main.rs: history event compat timestamp serialization
- tui.rs: timestamp search and history event display

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
